en.extract:
The black-necklaced honeyeater or black-chested honeyeater (Lichmera notabilis) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae.
It is endemic to Wetar.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, and rural gardens.
It is threatened by habitat loss.


Taxonomy
The black-necklaced honeyeater was first described by in 1898 by naturalist Otto Finsch with the name Stigmatops notabilis. Today, it placed in the genus Lichmera, from Ancient Greek meaning "licking with the tongue", as Lichmera notabilis. It has no subspecies.

The '''black-necklaced honeyeater''' or '''black-chested honeyeater''' ('''''Lichmera notabilis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Wetar]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s, subtropical or tropical moist [[shrubland]], and rural gardens.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

==Taxonomy==
The black-necklaced honeyeater was first described by in 1898 by [[naturalist]] [[Otto Finsch]] with the name ''Stigmatops notabilis''.<ref name="leyden">{{cite journal |last1=Finsch |first1=Otto |title=On seven new species of Birds in the Leyden Museum from the islands of Wetter, Kisser, Letti and New-Guinea |journal=Notes from the Leyden Museum |date=1898 |volume=20 |page=130 |url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/item/37321#page/150/mode/1up |access-date=8 December 2025}}</ref> Today, it placed in the genus ''[[Lichmera]]'', from [[Ancient Greek]] meaning "licking with the tongue",<ref>{{ cite web | last=Jobling | first=James A. | title=Lichmera | work=The Key to Scientific Names | url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/key-to-scientific-names/search?q=Lichmera | publisher=Cornell Lab of Ornithology | access-date=26 October 2025 }}</ref> as ''Lichmera notabilis''.<ref name="Avibase">{{cite web |title=Lichmera notabilis (Black-chested Honeyeater) - Avibase |url=https://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=68F6A00C |website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org |access-date=8 December 2025}}</ref> It has no [[subspecies]].<ref name="botw">{{cite web |last1=Higgins |first1=Peter J. |last2=Christidis |first2=Les |last3=Ford |first3=Hugh |last4=Sharpe |first4=Christopher J. |title=Black-chested Honeyeater (Lichmera notabilis), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/blchon1/cur/introduction |website=Birds of the World |access-date=8 December 2025 |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.blchon1.01 |date=2020}}</ref>
